originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&flags` is never used.

presenceCondition: (and (= CROSS_COMPILE true) (= WIN32 false) (= NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES false))
model:
(define-fun WIN32 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CROSS_COMPILE () Bool
  true)
reasoning: Line 42: `flags |= T_ESCAPE_SHELL_CMD` in the #else branch (NEED_ENHANCED=F). flags is set in the loop but never read — dead store (same issue as PRODUCT_90/96 but in the \!NEED_ENHANCED branch). No '// ERROR' → new bug not in VBDB. CROSS_COMPILE=T prevents NEED_ENHANCED from being defined (consistent with NEED_ENHANCED=F). Dead store occurs whenever NEED_ENHANCED=F; WIN32=F is unnecessary (WIN32=T also gives NEED_ENHANCED=F when CROSS_COMPILE=T, since the WIN32 define block is in the #else). PC is over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
